questions.question: What is the SQL command to add a primary key constraint to the 'employee_id' column in the 'employee' table?
questions.hint: ALTER TABLE employee ADD CONSTRAINT PK_employee_id PRIMARY KEY (employee_id);

questions.question: What is the SQL command to add a NOT NULL constraint to the 'salary' column in the 'employee' table?
questions.hint: ALTER TABLE employee ALTER COLUMN salary SET NOT NULL;

questions.question: How would the SQL command look to add both a primary key constraint to the 'employee_id' column and a NOT NULL constraint to the 'salary' column in the 'employee' table?
questions.hint: ALTER TABLE employee ADD CONSTRAINT PK_employee_id PRIMARY KEY (employee_id), ALTER COLUMN salary SET NOT NULL;
